summary: Backend 100% green (27/27 tests: 10 prior + 17 new for next-code/NAS Luhn/duplicate/adresses-courant/mega/inhab/web-password/mandats/6 PDF rapports/users-admin-only/lecteur-readonly/editeur-no-delete-avocat). Frontend has CRITICAL crash on AvocatSheet: ReferenceError 'QC_DISTRICTS is not defined' — blocks all 5 tabs. Rapports page renders OK with all 6 download buttons; mandat-form not found on Rapports (likely needs to scroll or is on a different sub-route).

ui_bugs.issue: ReferenceError: QC_DISTRICTS is not defined — crashes the entire avocat sheet, makes 5 tabs (tab-ident/tab-adr/tab-inhab/tab-mega/tab-web) unreachable in the rendered DOM. Need to import or define QC_DISTRICTS array (list of Quebec districts with {id, name}).
data-testid='mandat-form' not found in DOM after navigating to /rapports. Either the form is collapsed/lazy or selector missing.

action_items: URGENT: Define/import QC_DISTRICTS in /app/frontend/src/components/AvocatSheet.jsx (e.g., const QC_DISTRICTS = [{id:1,name:'Montréal'}, ...] or import from constants file). This crash blocks all 5-tab UI testing.
Verify mandat-form is rendered/visible on /rapports (or add data-testid).
critical_code_review_comments: AvocatSheet.jsx references undefined symbol QC_DISTRICTS (runtime crash) — basic dev test would have caught this. Add an ESLint no-undef rule + smoke test.
server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') — migrate to FastAPI lifespan().
No brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook recommends after 5 fails).
Cookie secure=False hardcoded — drive via COOKIE_SECURE env for prod.

success_rate.frontend: 40% (login + sidebar + Rapports buttons OK; AvocatSheet 5 tabs blocked by JS crash)

test_credentials: admin@gestioncardex.qc / Admin2026! (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Test users created via API for permissions matrix and cleaned up.
seed_data_creation: Tests create avocats with prefixes T/S/N/D/E/L (UUID-suffixed) and test users test_editeur_*@x.qc, test_lecteur_*@x.qc — all cleaned via fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully validated. After main agent fixes QC_DISTRICTS, retest AvocatSheet 5-tab workflow: create avocat → tabs become enabled → fill mega (mega-francais, mega-art486, mega-tous-districts, save-mega-btn) → inhabilités (add-inhab-btn, save-inhab-btn) → web (web-codeusager, save-web-password). Pytest entry: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. v2 test file: test_features_v2.py.
rca_of_the_issue: AvocatSheet.jsx uses QC_DISTRICTS at lines 372 and 375 (Méga tab district selector) but never imports or declares it. Result: React component throws ReferenceError on mount → ErrorBoundary/runtime overlay covers the whole avocat sheet → no tabs render → playwright cannot find tab-ident/tab-adr/tab-inhab/tab-mega/tab-web. Fix: declare const QC_DISTRICTS = [{id:1,name:'Abitibi'},...] (Quebec judicial districts) in AvocatSheet.jsx or import from a constants module.
